decks.notes: This control deck focuses on disruption, card advantage, and removal to dominate the battlefield. With a high number of counterspells like Daze and Force of Will, along with disruptive creatures like Meddling Mage and Murktide Regent, the deck aims to control the opponent's plays and protect its own threats. Card selection and manipulation with Brainstorm and Ponder help find key pieces, while removal spells like Swords to Plowshares keep the board clear. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student, Quantum Riddler, and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd provide card advantage and recursion to outvalue opponents. The deck also includes some land destruction with Wasteland to further disrupt the opponent's game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly generate mana through various fast mana sources such as Lion's Eye Diamond and Lotus Petal, as well as rituals like Dark Ritual and Cabal Ritual. The deck aims to use these resources to cast spells that generate additional cards or mana, such as Burning Wish, Beseech the Mirror, and Echo of Eons. Ultimately, the goal is to assemble a storm count and cast Tendrils of Agony to drain the opponent's life total. The inclusion of cards like Gaea's Will and Song of Creation help to enable explosive turns and win the game in a single turn.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly and efficiently assemble the combo pieces needed to win the game with Thassa's Oracle and Doomsday. The deck utilizes cards like Dark Ritual, Lotus Petal, and Lion's Eye Diamond to generate mana quickly, alongside disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to protect the combo. The Fantasticar can help dig through the deck for key cards, while Flow State can be used to protect the combo from disruption. Overall, the strategy revolves around setting up the combo and winning the game in a single turn.

The key concept of the deck is to quickly generate mana and draw cards to set up a powerful combo using The Fantasticar. The deck aims to assemble Lion's Eye Diamond, Burning Wish, and other fast mana sources to cast spells like Tendrils of Agony or Echo of Eons for a game-winning combo. The deck also utilizes disruptive elements like Hexing Squelcher to control the board and protect its combo pieces. Overall, the deck focuses on fast mana generation and card draw to execute a lethal combo while disrupting opponents.

The main concept of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Stifle, Force of Will, and Daze while controlling the board with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares. The deck aims to generate card advantage and dig through the deck with Ponder and Brainstorm. The win condition is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Voice of Victory, Guide of Souls, and Ocelot Pride, supported by Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The mana base is designed to provide access to all necessary colors while also including land destruction with Wasteland.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the powerful mana acceleration from Cloudpost and Tron lands to quickly ramp up to big threats like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storms. The deck also packs a heavy amount of control elements like Force of Will and Force of Negation to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, there are powerful payoff cards like Kozilek's Command and Eldrazi Confluence to further swing the game in the player's favor. The ultimate goal is to establish a dominant board presence and overpower the opponent with overwhelming threats and control.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly disrupt the opponent's game plan by using a combination of cheap removal spells and disruptive spells like Thoughtseize. The deck also aims to apply pressure with efficient creatures like Nethergoyf and Moonshadow while maintaining tempo with counterspells like Daze and Force of Will. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive playstyle with a mix of fetchlands and dual lands. Overall, this deck aims to control the game through disruption and aggression to secure a quick victory.

This deck focuses on assembling the combo pieces of The Fantasticar, utilizing cards like Dark Ritual, Lotus Petal, and Quantum Riddler to generate mana and dig through the deck with Ponder and Mishra's Bauble. Force of Will is used for protection while disrupting opponent's strategies with Thoughtseize and Duress. The deck aims to achieve a powerful win condition using The Fantasticar's abilities to generate advantage and overwhelm the opponent. synergies between cards like Flow State and Brainstorm are utilized to maximize efficiency and ensure the combo goes off smoothly.

The main focus of this Legacy 1 vs 1 Combo - Show and Tell deck is to quickly put powerful creatures into play using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. By manipulating the board state through cards like Ponder and Brainstorm, the deck aims to cheat out big threats such as Griselbrand, Emrakul, the Aeons Torn, and Atraxa, Grand Unifier. The deck utilizes mana acceleration from cards like Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb to ensure these powerful creatures hit the battlefield early and overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to respond.

The deck focuses on utilizing fast mana acceleration, card filtering, and counterspells to efficiently combo off with the card Doomsday and win the game with Thassa's Oracle. The Fantasticar serves as an additional win condition and provides protection against opposing creature-based strategies. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces while disrupting the opponent's game plan with disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will. The synergy between the various cards in the deck allows for explosive turns and swift victories in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

This Dimir Tempo deck focuses on using efficient removal and disruptive spells to control the tempo of the game, while putting pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures like Murktide Regent and Nethergoyf. Utilizing cards like Daze, Thoughtseize, and Force of Will allows the deck to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up its own threats. By efficiently managing resources and making strategic plays, this deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and maintain control of the battlefield to secure a victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing cards like Violent Outburst and Living End to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures, then casting Living End to bring them all back onto the battlefield. The deck also includes counter spells like Force of Will and Force of Negation to protect the combo. Creatures like Striped Riverwinder and Curator of Mysteries help with card draw and filtering, while cards like Shardless Agent help with cascade mechanics. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a quick and powerful board state created from the graveyard.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble powerful artifacts such as The One Ring, Mishra's Research Desk, and The Fantasticar, utilizing cards like Urza's Bauble, Mox Opal, and Lotus Petal to generate mana quickly. With the ability to search for specific artifacts with Urza's Saga and the support of Tezzeret, Cruel Captain, this combo-based deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of explosive plays and efficient artifact synergies, while also utilizing cards like Kozilek's Command and Glaring Fleshraker for control and disruption.

The key strategy of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan by using efficient threats like Orcish Bowmasters and Murktide Regent, while controlling the board with spells like Fatal Push and Force of Will. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and disruption, while cards like Thoughtseize and Daze help to disrupt the opponent's hand and mana base. The deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain tempo throughout the game, using a combination of aggression and disruption to secure victory.

This Dimir Tempo deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will while applying pressure with aggressive creatures like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares. The deck aims to control the pace of the game through efficient removal spells such as Fatal Push and Snuff Out, allowing it to quickly close out games with its evasive threats. By combining disruption and aggression, this deck aims to outpace its opponents and secure victories through tempo advantage.

The deck focuses on assembling the Painter's Servant and Grindstone combo to mill the opponent's library. It also includes powerful artifacts and disruptive spells to control the board and protect the combo. Emry, Lurker of the Loch provides recursion for key artifacts, while Urza's Saga helps find them. The deck aims to quickly set up its combo while disrupting the opponent's game plan, ultimately winning through a mill victory.
